nasb.text: Prepare war against her; Arise, and let us attack at noon. Woe to us, for the day declines, For the shadows of the evening lengthen!

esv.text: “Prepare war against her; arise, and let us attack at noon! Woe to us, for the day declines, for the shadows of evening lengthen!

cnv.text: “你們要備戰攻擊她！ 起來！我們趁著正午上去。 唉！可惜日漸西沉， 暮影拖長了！

ccb.text: 他们喊道，‘准备作战！ 我们中午攻城。’ 他们后来说， ‘唉！日已西沉，天色渐暗。
